calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights
Off Calendar Sep-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TURAN T. WILLIAMS, Esq. specially appearing for James R. Felton, Esq. of G&B Law, LLP (Tel: 818-382-6200) for petitioner J.G. Wentworth Originations, LLC;
Transferor/Payee JERMIESHA ROBINSON present in pro per.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER J.G. WENTWORTH ORIGINATIONS, LLC's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Payment Rights.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed petiioner's counsel and transferor to appear.

The Court inquires of Ms. Robinson as to her understanding of and agreement to the terms of the proposed transfer. Ms. Robinson indicates that she understands and agrees to those terms.

The Court rules as follows: Petitioner's petition for approval for transfer of payment rights is GRANTED.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
